query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A forest scene showing tall slender tree trunks rising vertically through layered bands of autumn color, ranging from deep green through yellow and orange to reddish-brown at the base, with warm light filtering from above.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily motion-blurred forest scene with tall slender tree trunks rendered as vertical streaks, creating an abstract composition of layered autumn colors from deep green through yellow and orange to reddish-brown at the base, with a soft faded warmth and indistinct forms dissolving into pure color and gesture.
